page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.m2 server family. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. It is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

The ecs.m2.medium instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. It contains zero graphics processing units and does not bundle complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource sharing or CPU credit limitations.

With its high memory density relative to the processing core count, the instance offers a cost-effective profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive parallel processing. It is suited for hosting small-to-medium relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise applications, and lightweight data processing pipelines where memory capacity is the primary constraint.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is a memory-optimized instance within the ecs.m2 family, featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. Managed by the KVM hypervisor, it provides 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance operates with a single thread per core and dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring predictable performance. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-constrained workloads that do not require high-density compute or local storage. It is suited for running in-memory databases, caching systems, and enterprise applications.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring a high memory-to-core ratio for caching, databases, and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
